chat.welcomeMessage: Welcome! I can help you explore and work with the information in this project. You can upload files, build a knowledge base, ask questions about your documents, and get grounded answers based on the content available here. To get started, add files to this chat or project, then ask a question, request a summary, or explore key insights.

onboarding.heroDescription: Upload your files, build a searchable knowledge base, and get accurate answers powered by retrieval-augmented generation. Perfect for teams who need fast, reliable information retrieval.

upload.title: Upload & Index Documents
upload.description: Upload PDFs, Word files, and text documents. They're automatically indexed for fast, accurate retrieval.

knowledge.title: Multimodal Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Combine text, structured data, and multiple file formats into a centralized knowledge base per project.

rag.title: RAG-Powered Chat
rag.description: Ask questions in natural language. Responses are grounded in your uploaded content for improved accuracy.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Share projects with team members. Ensure consistent answers from a shared source of truth.

notebooks.title: Organize Insights with Notebooks
notebooks.description: Go beyond Q&A — structure your knowledge, capture findings, and build reusable research workflows.

build.title: Build Research Notebooks
build.description: Organize documents, questions, and sources into focused knowledge workspaces.

save.title: Save and Reuse Insights
save.description: Turn useful answers into notes, refine them, and add them back as reusable sources.

useCases.title: What You Can Do with Researcher
useCases.description: Practical ways to get value from your documents and knowledge.

research.title: Research & Analysis
research.description: Explore papers, reports, specifications, and long documents faster.

learning.title: Learning & Study
learning.description: Turn dense material into clear explanations, summaries, and study notes.

qa.title: Document Q&A
qa.description: Ask questions across your uploaded files and get grounded answers quickly.

organize.title: Knowledge Organization
organize.description: Build reusable notebooks, notes, and source-backed knowledge bases.

pricingDialog.title: Choose Your Plan
pricingDialog.subtitle: Select the plan that fits how much you research, crawl, save, and collaborate. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

features.2: 5 document uploads per project or notebook
features.3: Chat context includes the last 2 turns
features.4: Website crawls up to 25 pages with basic extraction
features.7: No sharing — projects and notebooks stay private

features.3: 10 document uploads per project or notebook
features.4: Chat context includes the last 5 turns
features.5: Website crawls up to 100 pages with advanced extraction
features.8: Project sharing with up to 3 members
features.9: Notebook sharing not included — upgrade to Premium

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For power users and growing teams

features.3: 50 document uploads per project or notebook
features.4: Chat context includes the last 10 turns
features.5: Website crawls up to 200 pages with advanced extraction
features.9: Unlimited project sharing with unlimited members
features.10: Unlimited notebook sharing with unlimited members

features.3: Chat context includes the last 10 turns
features.4: Website crawls up to 200 pages with advanced extraction

plantAdvisor.title: Plant Advisor
plantAdvisor.subtitle: Identify plants, track plant health, and prepare treatment plans.
plantAdvisor.emptyHint: Start a new scan to add notes and plant photos.
plantAdvisor.saveFirstToUpload: Save the case first to upload images.
plantAdvisor.formSubtitle: Provide a short title and any context. Phase 1 stores your case, photos, and notes — image identification and disease diagnosis are coming next.
plantAdvisor.confirmDelete: Delete this plant case and all its images?

fields.title: Title
fields.goalPh: What do you want to do?

goalDescriptions.identify: Figure out what plant this is.
goalDescriptions.diagnose: Check disease, pest damage, nutrient deficiency, pesticide injury, or environmental stress.
goalDescriptions.improve_growth: Get care guidance for watering, soil, light, pruning, and growing conditions.
goalDescriptions.increase_income: Plan yield, quality, harvest timing, and market value.

errors.badType: unsupported file type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.

intro.default: I have your plant case "{{title}}" loaded. I use case context, provider results, and your notes — I do not directly inspect the photos here.
intro.identify: I have your plant identification case "{{title}}" loaded. I can explain the confirmed plant, confidence score, possible alternatives, and what extra photos could improve identification. I do not directly inspect the photos here; I use the case context, provider results, and your notes.
intro.diagnose: I have your plant diagnosis case "{{title}}" loaded. I can discuss possible problems — disease, pest damage, nutrient deficiency, pesticide injury, or environmental stress — based on the confirmed plant, provider candidates, and your notes. I do not provide chemical product names, doses, or treatment instructions.
intro.improve_growth: I have your growth case "{{title}}" loaded. I can suggest general care checks based on the case context and confirmed plant profile if available. I do not provide fertilizer product names or doses.
intro.increase_income: I have your yield planning case "{{title}}" loaded. I can discuss general considerations based on the confirmed plant and case context.

emptyStates.diagnoseNotRunYet: Plant is confirmed, but diagnosis has not been run yet. Add clear symptom photos and run diagnosis to get disease or pest candidates.

photoRoles.damagedPart: Damaged part in close-up, if relevant

symptomPhotoRoles.affectedLeafUpper: Close-up of affected leaf upper side
symptomPhotoRoles.stemCaneLesions: Stem or cane lesions, if present
symptomPhotoRoles.fruitFlowerDamage: Fruit or flower damage, if present
symptomPhotoRoles.healthyVsAffected: Healthy and affected parts side by side
symptomPhotoRoles.symptomStages: Several stages of symptoms, if available

banners.identifyLowConfidence: Low confidence identification. The confirmed plant has a low provider score and close alternatives. Use this chat to understand the result and collect better evidence before relying on the exact species.
banners.diagnoseUncertain: Diagnosis is uncertain. Review symptoms, candidate relevance, and missing evidence before relying on this result.
banners.diagnoseNeedsPlantConfirm: This is a diagnosis case. Confirm the plant identification first — disease candidates need a confirmed plant to be meaningful.

warnings.aiMismatch: AI interpretation and confirmed diagnosis may differ. Review candidates before acting.

disclaimers.noImageInspection: Chat uses case context, provider results, and notes. It does not directly inspect images.
disclaimers.noChemicalGuidance: This chat explains symptoms, uncertainty, and visual checks. It does not provide pesticide, fungicide, herbicide, or fertilizer product names, doses, mixing rates, spray intervals, or product-specific treatment instructions.

qq.identifyCheckDetails: What details should I check on the plant?
qq.identifyCouldBeSimilar: Could this be another similar plant?
qq.uploadForDiagnosis: What images should I upload for diagnosis?
qq.whyConfirmPlant: Why do I need to confirm the plant first?
qq.diagnoseWhyConfirmFirst: Why do I need to confirm the plant before diagnosis?
qq.diagnosePrepPhotos: What photos should I add to prepare for diagnosis?
qq.diagnoseMostLikely: What is the most likely problem?
qq.diagnoseCouldBePest: Could this be pest damage instead of disease?
qq.diagnoseCouldBeDiseasePestStress: Could this be disease, pest damage, or plant stress?
qq.diagnoseCouldBeDeficiency: Could this be a nutrient deficiency?
qq.diagnoseCouldBePesticide: Could pesticide injury cause these symptoms?
qq.diagnoseWhatToAvoid: What should I avoid doing now?
qq.aiPreferred: Why did AI prefer this candidate?
qq.checkVisually: What should I check visually next?
qq.unlikelyCandidates: Which candidates seem unlikely and why?
qq.extraPhotos: What extra photos would improve confidence?
qq.growthHowWater: How should I water this plant?
qq.growthHowMuchSun: How much sun does it need?
qq.growthLimitsLocation: What could limit its growth in this location?
qq.growthMonitorMonth: What should I monitor this month?
qq.growthReliabilityLowConf: How reliable is this advice given the low identification confidence?
